prompt: Create a vertical dark fantasy anime celebration poster in a dramatic electric-blue and black palette, featuring a single young anime woman floating diagonally through a storm of magical energy. She has long windblown black hair, pale skin, a calm slightly melancholic expression, and a revealing gothic black outfit with thigh straps, seen partly behind the typography. Surround her with jagged lightning arcs, glowing blue flames, shattered glass-like fragments, swirling dark ribbons, luminous blue petals, and 4 distinct blue roses: one small rose at the lower left, one bright rose at the right of the number, one large rose near the lower right, and one dark rose at the bottom-right edge. Put large ornate glowing cursive neon lettering across the foreground, tilted with perspective and crackling edges, using 5 readable text elements: “Thank you for your attention!” across the upper and middle area, “Over 700” huge in the lower middle, “followers!!” across the lower area, and “from @kuso_seisakusyo” small near the bottom. The typography should look like blue lightning calligraphy with a white-hot inner glow, cyan outer aura, and dark shadow, partially obscuring the character while remaining legible. Use high-contrast cinematic lighting, deep navy shadows, intense sapphire highlights, floating particles, motion blur, glossy fantasy illustration rendering, and a highly detailed gpt-image-2 anime key visual composition.
